findings.title: CVE-2026-32746: GNU InetUtils / BSD Telnetd Pre-Auth Root RCE — WatchTowr Confirms Blast Radius Extends to Citrix NetScaler, FreeBSD, Apple, TrueNAS
findings.affected_technology: GNU InetUtils telnetd ≤2.7, FreeBSD, NetBSD, Citrix NetScaler, Ubuntu, Debian, Apple Mac Tahoe, TrueNAS Core, DragonFlyBSD
findings.summary: Pre-auth BSS buffer overflow in LINEMODE SLC handler (telnetd) enables root RCE before any login prompt; WatchTowr analysis published today confirms the same vulnerable code is present in Citrix NetScaler, all major Linux distros, FreeBSD, and Apple macOS; no patch until April 1, 2026; PoC available; ~3,362 exposed hosts on internet.

findings.title: CVE-2026-3055 + CVE-2026-4368: Citrix NetScaler ADC/Gateway Dual Advisory — Unauthenticated Memory Leak (CVSS 9.3) and Session Mixup Race Condition
findings.affected_technology: Citrix NetScaler ADC, Citrix NetScaler Gateway (on-prem, SAML IDP or Gateway/AAA configured)
findings.summary: CVE-2026-3055 (CVSS 9.3) is an unauthenticated OOB read on SAML IDP-configured NetScaler appliances allowing remote memory disclosure — similar to CitrixBleed; CVE-2026-4368 (CVSS 7.7) is a race condition on Gateway/AAA virtual servers leading to user session mixup; both patched in 14.1-66.59 and 13.1-62.23; no exploitation or PoC observed yet.

findings.title: CVE-2026-25769: Wazuh Cluster Remote Code Execution via Insecure Deserialization — Public PoC Released
findings.summary: Hakai Security released a working PoC (30 GitHub stars, 7h ago) for RCE via insecure deserialization in the Wazuh cluster protocol; Wazuh is widely deployed as a free/open-source SIEM; network access to cluster port TCP 1516 required; patch available per GHSA-3gm7-962f-fxw5; restrict cluster port to cluster IPs immediately.

findings.title: TeamPCP Deploys Geofenced Iran-Targeting Kubernetes Wiper via Compromised Trivy CI/CD Infrastructure
findings.affected_technology: Kubernetes clusters, Docker environments, GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines (Trivy users)
findings.summary: TeamPCP leveraged its Trivy supply chain compromise infrastructure to deploy a new wiper payload that destroys all data on Kubernetes cluster nodes (or the local machine if no K8s) when Iran timezone or Farsi locale is detected; FortiGuard reports rising regional cyber activity post-Iran strikes; C2 at scan.aquasecurtiy[.]org; rotate all CI/CD secrets from affected Trivy workflows.

noted.summary: Blind SQL injection in multiple endpoints due to insufficient parameter validation; CVSS 7.1; fixed in versions 15.100.0 and 16.8.0; no exploitation reported.

Public PoC (28 stars, updated ~3h ago) for BYOVD Ring-0 privilege escalation via vulnerable Safetica driver, enabling process termination and physical memory R/W; paired with CVE-2025-7771; associated with MedusaLocker EDR-killer TTPs.

SEC Consult SA-20260317-0 discloses multiple privilege escalation vulnerabilities in PEGA Infinity; no CVE IDs or CVSS published yet; widely deployed in financial-sector BPM/CRM; monitor vendor advisories.
